D.detail:
Mode A (Entry-only): Evaluated only on the rows that became actual SEPA candidates (drives quality gates).
Mode B (Stateful): Evaluated across all rows in the window to test signal retention (informational, no gates).

Metrics Summary: Mode A: n=38076 across 2274 days. Binary IC median=0.4082 (t=42.23), MFE IC median=0.3818 (t=32.05). Mode B: not built (skip mode_b).

E.detail: Sweep T ∈ [0.3, 0.4, 0.5, 0.6, 0.7]. At T*=0.6: precision=0.4399 (3.80× prev), coverage=1.49%, trades/mo=2.05, E[MFE|gate]=40.90%.
